backend/main.mo: Main actor for the Whispers of the White Moon backend, defining types and CRUD operations for characters, episodes, contact requests, user profiles, worldbuilding, and content, with authorization and blob storage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that carries over existing state (episodes, characters, user profiles, contents) from the old actor shape to the new actor shape with no structural changes.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two confirmed high-confidence features: a drag-reorder save button for AdminCharactersPanel and a new AdminWorldbuildingPanel tab, both evidenced by frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated text file containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the project's frontend component and hook responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including sidebar and chart color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/RUN-LOCAL-AND-DEPLOY-IC.md: Step-by-step guide for installing prerequisites, running the project locally, and deploying it to the Internet Computer mainnet, including a deployment verification checklist and troubleshooting tips.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that conditionally renders the AdminDashboard at /admin or the full public-facing site with all section components, wrapped in a React Query provider.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Simple section component that renders the anime series synopsis from animeSiteConfig with a section header and readable typography.
frontend/src/components/AdminCharactersP: Admin panel for managing characters with drag-and-drop reordering, optimistic UI updates, add/edit/delete actions, and a save button that persists the new display order to the backend.
frontend/src/components/AdminContactRequ: Admin panel component for viewing, filtering, updating status, deleting, and exporting contact requests as CSV. Uses React Query hooks and displays requests with topic labels, timestamps, and processed/pending badges.
frontend/src/components/AdminContentPane: Admin panel for managing content entries, supporting list view with add, edit, and delete operations. Delegates to ContentForm for create/edit and uses React Query hooks for data fetching and mutation.
frontend/src/components/AdminDashboard.t: Top-level admin dashboard component handling Internet Identity authentication, admin role verification, and section routing via a sidebar. Renders different admin panels (episodes, characters, content, contacts, roles) based on the active section.
frontend/src/components/AdminEpisodesPan: Admin panel for managing episodes with list, add, edit, and delete functionality, sorted by season and episode number. Delegates to EpisodeForm for create/edit and uses React Query hooks for data operations.
frontend/src/components/AdminRolePanel.t: Admin panel for role management that displays the current user's principal ID and allows granting admin roles to other users by principal ID. Uses the grantAdminRole mutation hook and provides copy-to-clipboard functionality.
frontend/src/components/AdminSection.tsx: Admin panel component that handles authentication via Internet Identity, displays and manages contact requests (filter, status toggle, export to CSV), and allows granting admin roles to other principals.
frontend/src/components/AdminSidebar.tsx: Sidebar navigation component for the admin dashboard with links to Episodes, Characters, Content, Contact Requests, and Role Management sections, supporting both desktop and mobile (overlay) layouts.
frontend/src/components/CharacterForm.ts: Form component for creating or editing a character, using react-hook-form with fields for name, role, bio, image URL, weapon, power, and traits, wired to create/update mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/CharacterMatchQu: Multi-step quiz component with 7 personality questions that collects trait-tagged answers and computes a character match score against the anime site's character roster.
frontend/src/components/CharacterMatchRe: Displays the quiz result showing the matched character's details (image, bio, weapon, personality, power state) along with a match percentage progress bar and a restart button.
frontend/src/components/CharacterMatchSe: Section wrapper that manages quiz state (not-started, in-progress, completed) and renders the intro card, CharacterMatchQuiz, or CharacterMatchResult accordingly.
frontend/src/components/CharactersSectio: Displays a paginated grid of character cards fetched from the API, showing image, name, role, bio, weapon, power, and traits, with loading skeletons and error/empty states.
frontend/src/components/ClansSection.tsx: Renders a static grid of seven elemental clan cards, each with a sigil image, name, and description.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Provides a contact form with email, topic, and message fields that validates input and submits via a mutation hook, showing toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/ContentForm.tsx: Admin form for creating or editing content entries (announcements, lore, news, etc.) using react-hook-form, with fields for type, title, body, and image URL.
frontend/src/components/ContentSection.t: Fetches and displays news/update content items in a responsive card grid with badge labels, loading skeletons, and error/empty states.
frontend/src/components/EpisodeForm.tsx: Admin form for creating or editing episode records with fields for title, description, video URL, thumbnail URL, season number, and episode number.
Displays a sorted list of episodes fetched from the backend, with loading skeletons and error states, allowing users to select an episode and smooth-scroll to the video section.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component showing copyright, a YouTube channel link, and a Cash App donation handle.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, anime title, tagline, and two CTA buttons that smooth-scroll to the About and Characters sections.
frontend/src/components/IntroSection.tsx: Renders an introduction section with an embedded or direct video player, a fallback external link button, and a synopsis excerpt pulled from site config.
frontend/src/components/RewardsSection.t: Displays a donations section with a Cash App handle and a list of tiered donation reward levels sourced from site config.
frontend/src/components/SectionHeader.ts: Reusable centered section header component that renders a title with a decorative accent underline.
frontend/src/components/TopNav.tsx: Fixed navigation bar with smooth-scroll links to page sections, scroll-based background change, mobile hamburger menu, and an admin dashboard link shown only to authenticated admins.
frontend/src/components/VideoSection.tsx: Video player section that renders a selected episode's video as either a direct HTML5 video element or an embedded iframe, with a placeholder when no episode is selected.
frontend/src/components/WorldbuildingSec: React component that renders the Worldbuilding section of the anime site, displaying clans, clan eye rules, power system, rank system, and the Shiranagi family using data from animeSiteConfig.
frontend/src/content/animeSiteConfig.ts: Central configuration object for the 'Whispers of the White Moon' anime site, containing all static content including synopsis, CTA buttons, reward tiers, and worldbuilding data (clans, power system, rank system).
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity state via React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for all backend interactions, including user profiles, contact requests, episodes, characters, content, and worldbuilding data.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind CSS setup, CSS custom properties for light/dark manga-themed color schemes, typography using Noto Serif JP and Inter fonts, and a scoped admin dashboard dark theme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/normalizeIntroEmbedUr: Utility function that converts YouTube and Vimeo share URLs into embed-friendly iframe URLs, leaving direct video file URLs unchanged.
frontend/src/utils/scrollToSection.ts: Utility function that smoothly scrolls the page to a DOM element by ID with a configurable pixel offset.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based colors, border radii, fonts, shadows, and accordion animations, using typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for 'Whispers of the White Moon' admin dashboard, listing existing features (character reorder save, worldbuilding panel) and pending feature requests (dark theme, image upload, worldbuilding tab).
